message:
test(ssh): add exec E2E test suite for SSH command execution

Add 4 E2E tests for SSH ExecDomain: echo, exit codes, stderr capture,
and environment variable forwarding. Tests use the embedded sshd test
fixture with unique session names derived from system time.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
